basic_info.title: EarthBound Beginnings
basic_info.review: A charming and quirky RPG that lays the foundation for the series, offering a unique blend of humor and horror that feels timeless despite its age.

play_today.details: Best modern option with official English localization, save states, and online play. Includes the complete MOTHER Restored fan translation patch.

recommended_patches.name: MOTHER 1+2 Fan Translation
recommended_patches.description: Complete English translation by Demi and Haeleth that translates all text including menus and story

recommended_patches.name: MOTHER Restored Patch
recommended_patches.description: Restores graphics and applies the fan translation, uncensors content for modern audiences

optimal_settings: Enable CRT filter for authentic NES look

play_today.details: Excellent portable option with official English localization and save states. Considered one of the best NES ports.

recommended_patches.name: MOTHER Restored Patch
recommended_patches.description: Restores graphics and applies the fan translation for complete English experience

play_today.details: Authentic original hardware experience. Best played with a CRT TV or emulator with accurate rendering.

recommended_patches.name: MOTHER 1+2 Fan Translation
recommended_patches.description: Complete English translation patch for the original Famicom ROM

optimal_settings: Use accurate mode for best compatibility

play_today.details: Avoid this version - community consensus states it's inferior in every way compared to the original NES version.

The most convenient and accessible version via Nintendo Switch Online. Features official English localization, modern controller support, and cloud saves. While it lacks the NES version's extra menu options, it offers the best balance of playability and ease of access for modern audiences without needing emulation.

The definitive modern console experience. This Virtual Console release includes the official English localization and retains the NES version's superior menu options (reconfigurable controls, map, run) which were removed in the Switch port. It offers a stable, authentic experience with save states via the Wii U system.

The original Japanese Famicom version is the most complete in terms of content but requires a fan translation to be playable for English speakers. It features the original soundtrack and map layouts. Best played via emulation with the 'Mother Restored' patch to fix bugs and add English text while preserving the authentic experience.

recommended_patches.name: MOTHER Restored
recommended_patches.description: A comprehensive patch for the NES version that replaces the script with the MOTHER 1+2 Fan Translation, restores censored graphics, and fixes bugs while preserving the original Japanese map layouts and music.

recommended_patches.name: EarthBound Beginnings: Definitive Edition
recommended_patches.description: A fork of the 25th Faithful Edition for NES that combines improvements from multiple fan translations to offer a polished, bug-free experience with enhanced gameplay balance.

recommended_patches.name: EarthBound Beginnings - The Revamped Edition
recommended_patches.description: A quality-of-life patch for NES that reduces random encounter rates and boosts experience and money gain to make the game less tedious while using the MOTHER 1+2 font.

optimal_settings: Enable Save States for quick checkpointing
Use Original Sound for authentic audio experience
Disable CRT Filters for clean pixel rendering
Configure Touch Controls for optimal button layout
Enable Save State Support for mobile play sessions
Set Audio Latency to Low for better sync

description.synopsis: In the year 1989, a young boy named Ninten is chosen by a mysterious alien to save the world from the evil Dr. Andonuts and his army of ghosts. Traveling through the suburbs of Onett and beyond, Ninten must gather a team of friends and master PSI powers to stop the alien invasion and restore peace to the Earth.
key_features: Turn-based combat system with PSI magic abilities
Unique first-person perspective for overworld exploration
Humorous and satirical dialogue contrasting with dark themes
Dynamic battle music that changes based on enemy types
Non-linear progression allowing exploration of multiple towns
Use of modern technology and pop culture references in a retro setting
Psychological horror elements integrated into a colorful aesthetic
legacy_and_impact: EarthBound Beginnings established the unique tone and gameplay mechanics that would define the Mother series, influencing countless RPGs with its subversive humor and modern setting. Its delayed Western release created a cult following that eventually led to its global recognition as a classic.
